rationale: A 44-minute beginner-to-advanced muscle growth training guide that comprehensively introduces Dr. Mike's hypertrophy programming framework.
title: How to Train for Muscle Growth: Beginner to Advanced Training

rationale: A full workout plan walkthrough showing how RP principles translate into an actual aesthetic physique program — ideal first watch.
title: How to Build the Most Aesthetic Physique (Full Workout Plan)

rationale: Directly teaches RIR-based effort calibration, a non-negotiable pillar of the RP methodology, in an accessible explainer format.
title: 11 Signs Your Workouts Aren’t Hard Enough to Build Muscle

rationale: Introduces the core RP volume landmarks concept (MEV/MAV/MRV) by explaining why most lifters undertrain relative to their volume needs.
title: Not Growing? You Aren’t Training Enough

rationale: A foundational coach-authored breakdown of rep ranges and stimulus-to-fatigue ratio, central to RP's hypertrophy science.
title: Low Reps Aren’t Worth It (for Muscle Growth)
